title: Thelypteris ciliata
taxonomy: Thelypteris ciliata is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae and the order Polypodiales. This species belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the maiden's hair ferns. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. The classification of Thelypteris ciliata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the fern kingdom. As a member of the Thelypteridaceae family, it shares distinct features with other species in this group.
